items.title: Solana and Google Cloud Team Up for Stablecoin-Powered AI Agent Payments
items.whyYouShouldCare: The partnership with Google Cloud enhances Solana's infrastructure, potentially increasing its appeal for stablecoin transactions and AI applications.

items.title: Solana whale bets $8 mln on SOL as price trades near $88 – Is $90 next?
items.whyYouShouldCare: A significant whale investment in SOL indicates strong confidence in the asset, which could influence market sentiment and liquidity around the $90 price point.

items.title: Wall Street Giant Morgan Stanley Enters Crypto Race With Pricing Edge: Report
items.whyYouShouldCare: Morgan Stanley's entry into crypto could bring institutional credibility and liquidity to the market, impacting Solana's competitive positioning.
